name: face-atlas-expand
desc: Add a NEW player-portrait slot beyond the canon caps. RE finding (2026-06-19): the Face tcf.hed is read WHOLE into a fixed BSS buffer at 0x02222ab0 sized exactly 0xa96 dwords = 0x2a58 bytes = 1355 slots (zeroed by FUN_00591f60's `for(0xa96)` loop; the very next live global DAT_02225508 sits at 0x02222ab0+0x2a58). The atlas reader FUN_005924c0 partitions those 1355 slots into 7 fixed blocks by hardcoded base displacements + per-atlas caps, and every block's cap EXACTLY saturates its slot range with ZERO headroom, EXCEPT gaf. O-blocks are stride-1 (oem slots 0..199 cap idx<200; oam +0x640=slot200 cap<150; o +0xaf0=slot350 cap<100). G-blocks are stride-3 (3 hed cols/index via param_4): gem (idx*3+0x1c2)*8=slot450 cap<100; gef +0x2ee=slot750 cap<50; gam +0x384=slot900 cap<100; gaf (idx*3+0x4b0)*8=slot1200 cap<50. gaf is the LAST block: idx 0..49 occupy slots 1200..1349, and the buffer extends to slot 1354 -> exactly ONE more index (idx 50, slots 1350..1352) fits in-buffer with no block overlap. So the single safe same-length cap raise that creates a genuinely-new addressable portrait slot is gaf cap 50 -> 51. Larger expansion (oem 199->9999 etc.) is IMPOSSIBLE same-length: every other block is saturated and growing the hed file overwrites adjacent live globals; it requires a code-cave that relocates the hed buffer to a larger free region and rewrites all 7 base displacements (tools/logh7_x86_patch.X86Builder), out of scope for a same-length patch. Pair with tools/logh7_tcf_pack.py `add --atlas gaf --slot 50` (now G-aware, stride-3) and bump FACE_ATLAS.gaf.cap 31->50 in src/server/logh7-face-codec.mjs (the JS cap, not the EXE cap, currently under-reports gaf capacity). See docs/logh7-modding-architecture.md B.2.
verified: BYTE-ENCODED + drift-verified against G7MTClient.korean.exe/_pristine.exe/.omo/ghidra/bin (all three: `83 f9 32` at fileoff 0x192911; opcode 83 f9 @ 0x192911-12, imm8 0x32 @ 0x192913, jl +0x0f follows). apply_byte_patches round-trip self-test PASS: applying changes EXACTLY one byte (imm8 0x32->0x33 @ fileoff 0x192913), reverting reproduces the base byte-for-byte. .text maps 1:1 (RVA==fileoff) confirmed from PE section headers. tcf.hed proven 1355 slots (10840B) installed = the fixed 0xa96-dword client buffer; gaf idx 50 -> slots 1350..1352 fits with no overlap. logh7_tcf_pack.py `add --atlas gaf --slot 50` round-trip PASS (1/1, all 3 stride cols -> one byte-exact 64x80 cell, warns it needs this patch). face-id codec 1110050 -> gaf idx 50 confirmed (no codec patch). Same-length 3->3 byte cap raise; builds cleanly through logh7_build_playable_client. NOT yet live-verified that a portrait packed at gaf idx 50 renders in the create/roster picker (needsLive).

patches.note: FUN_005924c0 case 6 (gaf): `cmp ecx,0x32; jl` index gate. ecx=[esp+0x130]=local index. 0x32(50)->0x33(51) admits gaf idx 50 (face-id 1110050; hed slots 1350..1352), the one slot the 1355-slot buffer physically has room for. Stays imm8 (sign-ext) form, same 3-byte length; jl target unchanged.

targets.what: 7-block atlas reader. caps: oem cmp eax,0xc8@0x00592533 (imm32 3d-form); oam cmp eax,0x96@0x005925ca; o cmp eax,0x64@0x00592665; gem cmp ecx,0x64@0x005926fe; gef cmp ecx,0x32@0x005927af; gam cmp ecx,0x64@0x00592860; gaf cmp ecx,0x32@0x00592911. bases: oem 0 / oam 0x640 / o 0xaf0 (stride1); gem 0x1c2 / gef 0x2ee / gam 0x384 / gaf 0x4b0 (stride3, *8 byte).
targets.note: only gaf has buffer headroom (1 index).

targets.what: zeroes hed buffer: `for(iVar1=0xa96)` => 0xa96 dwords = 0x2a58 B = 1355 slots; next global DAT_02225508 at +0x2a58.
targets.note: buffer size proof; cannot grow file.

targets.what: hed loader: ReadFile(GetFileSize) of /data/image/face/tcf.hed into &DAT_02222ab0 (FUN_005e38f0). reads whole file; no bounds.
targets.note: growing tcf.hed past 1355 slots overruns into DAT_02225508+.

targets.what: face-id codec: index=n%1000, M=n/1e6, d5=(n%1e6)/1e5, d4=(n%1e5)/1e4, d3=(n%1e4)/1e3. gaf=(M1,d5 1,d4 1,d3 0); idx already n%1000 so idx 50 decodes fine. NO codec patch needed.
